calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Dec-11-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Milton Katz for and with Tanya Scott (Petitioner).

The Court noted that this is a petition for instructions with respect to naming a Trust and stated that an estate does not have jurisdiction over a trust. Mr. Katz stated that title to the property is in the name of the Trust and that they will not be able to transfer title. The Court noted that this petition should have been filed in a new trust case number. The Clerk noted that the same petition was filed in case number PTR-18-302176 The Scott Family Trust with a hearing date of December 18, 2018. The Petition for Instructions in the probate case is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Anasse. Not reported.
